target: Don't let Ryunosuke's feelings go to waste, overcome your sorrow, and head towards the future.
So that's the best possible future.
At the very least, that's what I think.
I understand your answer. I have nothing else to ask.
Sorry to keep you waiting. Let's get going.
(I wonder if Nagumo-sensei is really satisfied with my answer just now?)
Once we get to town, we need to let everyone know about the monsters. Then I'll contact the police box too.
Considering those monsters, it's probably better to have more people go into the mountains.
Call the hunting club from the mainland… No, maybe the police would be better?
Yeah, considering those monsters haven't been spotted until now, they might have a tendency to avoid people.
Yeah… she somehow feels different from before—
I think I really… want to carve out my own future with my own hands.
Even if I might end up regretting it.
What?! You pulled out someone else's knife again! What do you plan to do with that?!
I really have to go back.
You should go to the hospital as planned. The wound from Haine… it must be hurting a lot, right?
Are you an idiot?! Why would I be the only one—
Nezu-san, was your shoulder injury really that bad…?
I'm worried about Nezu-san too, but right now we have to focus on Nagumo-sensei!
Hizuru-san, it's like she can sense Haine's presence…!
Nagumo-sensei, it's dangerous! Please come back!
(Nagumo-sensei… is she hiding Nezu-san's knife in her clothes?)
(If Nagumo-sensei is planning to use that knife on Haine…)
Here. This is where Ryunosuke was… by Haine.
Unfortunately, the real Ryunosuke is already…
So you could do that too… Just like the monster that turned into a snake and attacked us earlier.
Hizuru-san! You can't get any closer to Haine!
Straw, huh… So you did follow me.
But I want you to just watch quietly. This is a problem between Haine and me.
Right now, I want to talk to Haine alone.
You look like you're in a lot of pain. Even though you're the one who put Ryunosuke in such a cruel state…
I don't… I don't know…! But, I… like this…!
Stop crying already… Let's calm down and talk.
Uuuh… It was me… It wasn't me…!
There's only one person it could be, right?
I wish it wasn't you, Haine. If it wasn't, then how much…
What are your true feelings, Haine? Did you only see my brother as food? Or…
Did you want to be friends with my brother?
Ugh... why... Why did this happen!?
Haine was a precious friend! But Ryunosuke was precious to me too...
He was my precious little brother!!
(At the same time something entered Sensei's body, something else fell to the ground...)
(Don't tell me… she can see me?!)
Sh-she crushed her own right eye!?
(Haine is sinking into her own shadow...)
From the looks of it, she might not be coming back.

If you say so,
Then that's probably the case.
The other half of that monster from earlier!?

I'm sorry, Shinpei!
I didn't notice because it was hiding in Haine's presence!
Sensei, use Nezu-san's knife to cut its shadow!
(It must have fallen when I hugged Haine earlier!)

target: Don't shout... I'm just a little tired... so I lay down.
What just happened right now... I want you to tell me exactly what you saw.
Umm, to put it simply, Ryunosuke-san's data entered Hizuru-san's body...
And with incredible physical abilities, he defeated the shadow... the monster.
I knew it... so that's what happened.
Ryunosuke entered me, and defeated the monster...
Heh, it's just like a fantasy novel.
Triggered by a tragedy that befell their family, they gain immense power and fight unknown creatures... I suppose my class would be a hunter.
Right now, we're only a few pages past the opening scene.
The real battle... is yet to come.
Hizuru-san, it's almost like you know you'll be fighting shadows in the future.
Maybe I'm the one who created the 'beginning'...
Just survive.' Maybe it would have been better if I had just followed your words.
Thank you. For staying... close to me all this time.
It's really a pity about Ryunosuke.
I was saved by those words.
It's really a pity about Ryunosuke-san...
Thank you… I was saved by those words.
It seems our voices aren't reaching her at all. Even though they were just a moment ago.
Maybe this memory is nearing its end, making it harder to interfere.
But... if that's the case, it's a little different from when I saw the past before.
Before, the moment I thought 'it's over', I immediately went back in time...
Is this because I interfered too much with the past?
Maybe... that time Hai... ne... right eye...
Crushing her right eye... might be... the cause...!
(Just now, Haine crushed her own right eye.)
(Come to think of it... Sensei mentioned before...)
(That the reason I can loop time is because Haine's right eye was printed onto me.)
(I no longer have... the power to loop time--)
